dna: Photoreal portrait-lighting frame in the national-archive prestige lineage (dignified formal-portrait grammar, original subjects only). Texture/render: photoreal with fine archival grain, honest skin texture, controlled highlight rolloff; a prestige-portrait finish. Composition+motion: a dignified formal portrait, three-quarter or frontal, still and composed, gravity in the stillness; almost no motion, the formal light and restraint carrying the sense of importance and record.
